2605.03874.title: Spatiotemporal Convolutions on EEG signal -- A Representation Learning Perspective on Efficient and Explainable EEG Classification with Convolutional Neural Nets
2605.03874.paper_summary: Classification of EEG signals using shallow Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) is a prevalent and successful approach across a variety of fields. Most of these models use independent one-dimensional (1D) convolutional layers along the spatial and temporal dimensions, which are concatenated without a non-linear activation layer between. In this paper, we investigate an alternative encoding that operates a bi-dimensional (2D) spatiotemporal convolution. While 2D convolutions are numerically identical to two concatenated 1D convolutions along the two dimensions, the impact on learning is still uncertain. We test 1D and 2D CNNs and a CNN+transformer hybrid model in a low-dimensional (3-channel) and a high-dimensional (22-channel) BCI motor imagery classification task. We observe that 2D convolutions significantly reduce training time in high-dimensional tasks while maintaining performance. We investigate the root of this improvement and find no difference in spectral feature importance. However, a clear pattern emerges in representational similarity across models: 1D and 2D models yield vastly different representational geometries. Overall, we suggest an improved model with a 2D convolutional layer for faster training and inference. We also highlight the importance of architecturally-driven encoding when processing complex multivariate signals, as reflected in internal representations rather than purely in performance metrics.
2605.03874.paper_summary_zh: 使用淺層卷積神經網絡 (CNN) 進行 EEG 信號分類是一種在多個領域中普遍且成功的方法。這些模型大多使用獨立的一維 (1D) 卷積層，沿著空間和時間維度進行操作，並在兩者之間不加非線性激活層地進行串接。在本文中，我們探討一種替代編碼，該編碼運作於二維 (2D) 時空卷積。儘管 2D 卷積在數值上與沿著兩個維度串接的兩個 1D 卷積相同，但對學習的影響仍然不確定。我們在低維 (3 通道) 和高維 (22 通道) 的 BCI 動作意象分類任務中測試了 1D 和 2D CNN 以及 CNN+transformer 混合模型。我們觀察到 2D 卷積在高維任務中顯著減少了訓練時間，同時保持了性能。我們調查了這一改進的根源，發現光譜特徵重要性沒有差異。然而，在模型之間的表徵相似性中出現了明顯的模式：1D 和 2D 模型產生了截然不同的表徵幾何。總體而言，我們建議改進模型，使用 2D 卷積層以實現更快的訓練和推理。我們還強調在處理複雜的多變量信號時，架構驅動的編碼的重要性，這在內部表徵中得以體現，而不僅僅是在性能指標中。
2605.03874.author: Laurits Dixen et.al.
2605.03874.authors: Laurits Dixen, Stefan Heinrich, Paolo Burelli
